rationale: Abstract Y is superior in certainty calibration — explicitly acknowledging the single-arm design and calling for randomized confirmation — and uses Europace's standard AIMS/METHODS AND RESULTS/CONCLUSION structured format, while matching X on all quantitative rigor.
loser_weakness: Abstract X lacked explicit acknowledgment of design limitations in the conclusion and used a non-Europace section structure (Background/Methods/Results/Conclusions), weakening both certainty calibration and journal fit.
